summary: Iter51 credit-system overhaul (Fresher=99, Experienced=199, Interview reward=110, Job-post reward=200, Admin walk-in FREE) fully verified. Wrote /app/backend/tests/test_iter51_credit_overhaul.py with 17 test cases covering all 11 requested behaviours. RESULT: 17/17 PASSED (100%). All new constants + get_action_cost() helper + credits_charged persistence on slots/applications + one-time job_post_reward + admin refund path work as specified. NOTE: legacy tests hardcoded to 49/35/100 (test_iter30_phaseb_regression, test_iteration35_redemption_rate_1to1) are EXPECTED regressions vs new spec and were intentionally NOT re-run per main agent context note.

minor.issue: 'action_cost' in paid_tier still returns legacy ACTION_COST_FRESHER (99) module constant rather than user-specific get_action_cost(u). Cosmetic — GET /wallet already returns the correct per-user cost, which is what the frontend uses for gating.

Insufficient-credit path returns HTTP 402 while POST /api/interviews/book returns HTTP 400 for the same condition. Spec (line: 'trigger the 402/400 flow') accepts both, but the inconsistency is worth flagging so the frontend catches both codes.

action_items: Update /app/memory/test_credentials.md 'Business constants' section — still lists ACTION_COST=49, INTERVIEW_PRO_REWARD=35, JOB_POST_REWARD=100.
Consider aligning /subscription/plans.paid_tier.action_cost with get_action_cost(u) for consistency.
Consider harmonising HTTP status for insufficient-credit (currently 400 for interviews, 402 for jobs).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py get_action_cost() correctly defaults to fresher (99) when preferred_role missing — matches spec.
interviews.py book_interview persists credits_charged on the slot; admin_cancel_slot refunds exact amount — verified with both 99 and 199.
apply_job uses posting_reward_paid + conditional update_one modified_count check → race-safe & idempotent. Verified reward paid exactly once at 4th application, NOT on 5th.
user_public() surfaces action_cost only when role=='student' (line 266) — non-students correctly omit the key.
seed_data_creation: Test suite dynamically signs up disposable TEST_ prefixed Fresher/Experienced/Pro accounts (OTP mock), seeds credits + preferred_role directly in Mongo, and inserts pro-posted jobs + admin walk-in jobs + interview slots directly in Mongo to skip unrelated gates. No changes to seeded production users.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter51 credit-economy suite is stable and reusable at /app/backend/tests/test_iter51_credit_overhaul.py. Legacy iter30/iter35 tests hardcoded to 49/35/100 are known regressions of the new spec — do NOT try to 'fix' backend to satisfy them; the new constants (99/199/110/200) are the source of truth.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no bugs found. Two minor observations (subscription/plans stale field, 402 vs 400 mismatch) documented above but do not violate the spec's stated invariants.
